claude_max_5x.notes: Estimated as 5/20 × measured Claude Max 20× on Opus 4.7 (248M). Not directly measured.

claude_max_20x.name: Claude Max 20×
claude_max_20x.notes: Measured 2026-04-24 via claude-code --model opus on Opus 4.7 on Claude Max 20×. Multi-flip method (3 weekly-% crossings, first discarded). First real Opus-on-Max measurement; prior Opus rows used the Sonnet-derived 203M as a placeholder. Source: claude_measurement_20260424_094106.json.
claude_max_20x.measurement_method: multi-flip (3 weekly-meter crossings, first flip discarded)

claude_pro.name: Claude Pro
claude_pro.measurement_method: coarse single-delta (20-parallel batch moved weekly 0%→8% in one step; multi-flip data invalidated by all 3 crossings occurring in same batch — known script limitation with large PARALLEL on small-quota plans)
claude_pro.notes: Measured 2026-04-24 via claude-code --model opus on Opus 4.7 on Claude Pro. First real Pro measurement (Opus specifically). Coarse single-delta method: 1.25M tokens consumed 8% of weekly quota, extrapolated to ~15.6M tok/wk. Session meter went 0→100% confirming Pro has much tighter quota than Max. Sonnet-on-Pro measurement pending (weekly will reset Apr 28). Source: claude_measurement_20260424_161653.json.

claude_pro.name: Claude Pro
claude_pro.notes: Measured 2026-04-24 21:39 via claude-code --model sonnet on Sonnet 4.6 on Claude Pro. Multi-flip method, 3 flips in batches 4/7/11, per-1% deltas 168K + 224K (mean 196K/1%). 34% of 5h session consumed, 3% of weekly consumed. Clean run with no same-batch flip pileup. First proper Pro + Sonnet measurement. Source: claude_measurement_20260424_213954.json

claude_max_20x.name: Claude Max 20×
claude_max_20x.measurement_method: multi-flip (3 weekly-meter crossings, first flip discarded)
claude_max_20x.notes: Measured 2026-04-24 via claude-code --model sonnet on Sonnet 4.6 on Claude Max 20×. Multi-flip method (3 weekly-% crossings, first discarded). Source: claude_measurement_20260424_110655.json. Supersedes the Apr 16 Sonnet 4.5 single-flip run which gave 203M.

chatgpt_plus.name: ChatGPT Plus
chatgpt_plus.notes: Measured 2026-04-24 via codex-cli on gpt-5.4 xhigh on Plus. Multi-flip method. Note: this row shows ChatGPT Plus capacity on GPT-4o, but actual measurement was on GPT-5.4 — older Plus-tier models share the same weekly quota meter so the tokens/week figure applies, but quality is different.
chatgpt_plus.measurement_method: multi-flip (3 weekly-meter crossings, first flip discarded)

chatgpt_pro.name: ChatGPT Pro
chatgpt_pro.notes: Estimated as 5x Plus (not directly measured). ChatGPT Pro at $200/mo officially offers ~5x Plus quota. Help by running the measurement script on a Pro account.

chatgpt_business.name: ChatGPT Business
chatgpt_business.notes: Business quota measured on GPT-5.4 (not directly on GPT-4o), but weekly quota is per-account shared across models. Measured 2026-04-24 23:06 via codex-cli on gpt-5.4 xhigh on Business. Clean multi-flip: 3 flips in 3 separate batches (batches 1/3/4). Per-1% usable deltas: 356,526 and 567,666 — mean 462,096/1%. The 59% spread between the two deltas suggests the 3-flip sample is noisier than ideal; a 5-flip measurement would tighten the estimate. Coarse 3%-span gives 36.8M. Supersedes the contaminated 22:28 measurement (27M, multi-flip broken) and the Apr 15 single-flip measurement (60M, likely high-end outlier). Cache hit rate 80%.

mac_m4_max_128gb.notes: 744B MoE, 40B active params. Requires 128GB+ unified memory. MIT license.

rtx_4090.notes: Estimated from GLM-4.7 architecture (similar to 30-40B dense models).

framework_desktop_128gb.notes: MoE — aggressive TQ1_0 quant needed to fit in 128GB. CPU BLAS benchmarks on OpenBenchmarking.
MoE 1T/32B active. Extremely large — needs 128GB+ unified memory with heavy quantization.

mac_m4_max_128gb.notes: MoE 1T/32B active. Estimated — community reports similar MoE models at 8-12 t/s on M4 Max 128GB.

rtx_4090.notes: Requires 2× RTX 4090 (48GB total) or heavy CPU offloading. Single 4090 ~4-6 t/s with offload.

framework_desktop_128gb.notes: Full unified memory run. Estimated from V3.1 on same hardware class.

mac_m4_max_128gb.notes: Estimated — 685B MoE fits in 128GB with aggressive quant. ~37B active params.

rtx_4090.notes: MoE — only 3B active params per token. Fits in single 24GB GPU.

rtx_3090.notes: MoE — only 3B active params per token.
